blended.narrative: Sommet Saint-Sauveur is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 32 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
